description_long: This is a modern bungalow complex featuring a main single-story residence with a flat and slightly sloped roof, surrounded by lush landscaping and a central swimming pool. The property is organized with a long driveway leading to a detached garage and a separate guest house or auxiliary building. The main house has large glass windows and sliding doors, providing ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor living. The outdoor area includes manicured lawns, palm trees, and a patio with seating, creating a luxurious and inviting atmosphere. The architectural style is characterized by clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of white, gray, and wood-toned materials. The overall layout is spacious, with distinct zones for living, recreation, and parking.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow complex with a flat roof, large windows, a central pool, and landscaped outdoor spaces. The property includes a main house, detached garage, and guest house, all connected by a long driveway.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the entire bungalow complex from an elevated angle, highlighting the main house, pool, driveway, garage, and guest house with visible landscaping.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a side perspective, emphasizing the length of the driveway, the garage, and the pool area adjacent to the main house.
description_view_2: View 2 offers a rear view, focusing on the back of the main house, the garage, and the guest house, with the pool and garden visible between the buildings.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the front facade of the main house, the entrance, and the driveway leading to the garage, with the guest house and landscaping in the background.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
